'''Serpine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] known for [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] palaces. It was ruled by an "[[Emperor/Legends|emperor]]-[[Governor/Legends|governor]]."

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1stm|in book}}
